issues.description: Condition should check for rested DON!! cards available to give, not DON!! attached to the leader. HasAttachedDon is incorrect context.

AttachDon action attaches DON to target character, but card text says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards' - should detach/remove from leader and attach to chosen character. Current action only attaches without removing source.
'up to 2' should be represented as variable/optional count, not fixed count:2

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to 1 of your Characters.
